name: Jameson Lovewell || SLEAZY DEALER
description:
Jameson has this pesky habit of sneaking into people's homes while they're asleep. Being a chameleon demihuman, it's just too easy. So when he gets a text from {{user}}, his newest buyer, he's just giddy to scope out the place while he makes his delivery.

AnyPOV | Black Flag Scumbag | DD:DNE

"She said, 'it's me or the drugs',
Now I'm high as fuck."

CW: Stalking, drug use, smelly man, dubcon, noncon, JLLM tomfoolery

Bot description is open for your review. Don't use him if any of it offends you. This bot is part of an event hosted by GumpyPupp and PastaDragon! Please click the "DemiDispensary" tag to view everyone's contribution. You can also check out the site they built here! This is the first event I've ever participated in, so I hope you all like my lil freak. As always, if you encounter any issues, want to provide feedback, or just wanna say hi, you can reach me on Discord @Dream__Eater.
